title: Kanbus clock: increase created slide gap under TASK OPEN to 4px

comments.text: Applying created-card spacing tweak: add +2px spacer before first title line so TASK OPEN -> title gap is 4px.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented created-card spacing: added +2px spacer before first title row (line index 2), producing 4px under TASK/BUG OPEN. Validation: py_compile + tests/test_kanbus_clock.py (19 passed). Triggered visual lifecycle on kanbus-9c35d1.
